reviews.comment:
Realmente que tristeza me dió ese lugar. Ningún atractivo, poco señalizado para los viajeros; hace mucho calor le faltan árboles, la pequeña plazoleta sucia en estado de abandono, los caminos intransitables.
Un pueblo que puede desaparecer en el futuro, políticos que no hacen nada para generar trabajo, vida y que los jóvenes que viven en el lugar no se vayan.

(Translated by Google)
That place truly saddened me. It has no appeal, and the signage for travelers is poor; it's incredibly hot and lacks trees, the small plaza is dirty and neglected, and the roads are impassable.
It's a town that could disappear in the future, and the politicians do nothing to create jobs, foster a vibrant community, or prevent the young people who live there from leaving.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCM2YzUjlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Le vendría bien una refacción y renovación. Ni siquiera cuentan con la app YPF… así que lo demás, imagínense.

(Translated by Google)
It could use a refurbishment and renovation. They don't even have the YPF app... so you can imagine the rest.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/273276493457850534/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeWVuRkdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio y sus combustibles de buena calidad.sanitarios femenino excelente limpieza;no así él masculino! Confitería excelente.

Good service and good quality fuel. Excellent cleanliness in the women's restroom; not so much in the men's! Excellent confectionery.

reviews.comment:
El playero de la noche un desastre, nobnos atendia, pocas ganas de trabajar, encima le molestaba darte las llaves del baño un desubicado total

(Translated by Google)
The night attendant was a disaster, he didn't serve us, had little desire to work, and on top of that, he was annoyed to give us the bathroom keys, a total idiot.
